meta_title: Reposter Bot | Telegram Autoposting & Channel Network Management
meta_description: A professional bot for automating content across your Telegram channel network. 24/7 autoposting, post rebranding, and smart cleanup when moving content between channels.
meta_keywords: telegram autoposting, content automation, channel network management, reposter bot, telegram crossposting
og_description: A tool for automatically distributing content across your network of Telegram channels.
main_description: A professional solution for automating publishing across your network of Telegram channels. The bot moves posts from your main (source) channel to your child (destination) channels, adapting the formatting for each one.
feature1_info: Stable, continuous content transfer between the channels in your network without delays.
feature2_info: Posts are published under the destination channel's name: the source channel's signature and branding are replaced with the destination channel's own branding.
feature3_info: Automatic text processing: removal of the source channel's internal links and markers that don't belong on the destination channel.
feature4_info: Automatic insertion of hashtags, branded signatures, or buttons specific to each destination channel on the fly.
action_hint: Set up and launch forwarding in just 2 minutes!
